workspace.title: MEGA Downloads
workspace.subtitle: Read public shares and send file downloads to official MEGAcmd without accounts or sessions.
workspace.initial_preview: Enter a public MEGA share to check its type and official tool status.
workspace.wrong_site: This workspace accepts complete public MEGA share URLs only.

mega.name: MEGA Download
mega.purpose: Route public file shares to official mega-get; folder downloads are not enabled in 9.2
mega.control_location: Enable in MOD Manager to show the MEGA download workspace
